articles.description:
KFC is testing a new Handheld Pot Pie that's basically a hand-held version of the chain's regular Pot Pie.

The Handheld Pot Pie is being tested for a limited time at select locations in several states, including South Carolina, Georgia, Alabama, and Rhode Island.
It is priced at around $3.99 (the price varies with location) and, like its bigger Pot Pie brother, it is filled with fried chicken, diced potatoes, peas, carrots, and "savory" sauce, but with a flaky hand-held crust instead of a traditional pot pie crust in a pie tin. It's also available in a combo meal with Secret Recipe Fries and a drink for $7.99
Photo via KFC.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: KFC Tests New Handheld Pot Pie

articles.description:
McDonald's introduces new Hot Honey Sauce for a limited time. The new sauce is described as a "blend of sweet honey and spicy heat, infused with a subtle vinegar note."

You can get McDonald's Hot Honey Sauce in a dip cup with an order of Chicken McNuggets or McCrispy Strips, or purchase it separately for a small additional charge. The new sauce is also featured in several menu items, including:
- Hot Honey Sausage Egg Biscuit - A pork sausage patty, folded egg, and Hot Honey Sauce served on a biscuit.
- Bacon Hot Honey McCrispy Sandwich - A McCrispy filet, Hot Honey Sauce, thick-cut applewood-smoked bacon, crispy-fried jalapenos, shredded lettuce, mayo served on a toasted potato roll.
- Hot Honey McCrispy Sandwich - A McCrispy filet, Hot Honey Sauce, crispy-fried jalapenos, shredded lettuce, and mayo served on a toasted potato roll. 
- Hot Honey Snack Wrap - A McCrispy strip, shredded cheese, shredded lettuce, and Hot Honey Sauce wrapped in a tortilla.
While most of the selection consists of regular menu items with Hot Honey Sauce added, the crispy-fried jalapenos are a limited-time ingredient for the promotion.
Photo via McDonald's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: McDonald's Debuts New Hot Honey Sauce

articles.description:
This week, Domino's is offering a limited-time deal where you can get large 2-topping pizzas for $6.99 each when ordering for carryout through Sunday, February 1 2026, at participating locations nationwide.

The limited-time deal is available with several crust options, including Hand Tossed, Crunchy Thin, or New York Style crust. You can also get Parmesan Stuffed Crust for an extra charge (note that the crust only comes in medium).
The deal makes for a $1 savings (and one extra topping) over Domino's long-running $7.99 large one-topping carryout deal.
The deal may be slightly higher in some areas (it costs $7.99 here in Los Angeles).
Photo via Domino's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Domino's Offers $6.99 Large 2-Topping Pizza Carryout Deal

articles.description:
Taco Bell's Salted Caramel Churros feature mini churros with a creamy filling, dusted with salted caramel sugar.

These come three to an order and cost me $2.29.
Out of the bag, these looked pretty pale and disappointingly small. You can easily eat each one in a single bite.



The churros were light and crispy with a bit of chew under the crust. The filling is the same cream cheese icing that you find in Taco Bell's Cinnabon Delights. 
The salted caramel sugar was salty but lacked much of a caramel flavor. It seemed to be the same stuff they used for the Dulce del Leche Cinnamon Delights last year. I wouldn't have thought they were caramel-flavored at all if I didn't already know.



Overall, Taco Bell's Salted Caramel Churros were a miss for me. There's not all that much to nom on, and the main flavor is the creamy filling that you can already get from Cinnabon Delights. They had me missing when Taco Bell still offered a regular churro.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Review: Taco Bell - Salted Caramel Churros

articles.description:
After last week's debut, Crumbl keeps the Dubai Chocolate Cookie around for another week as part of this week's limited-time lineup through January 31, 2026.

In addition to the Dubai Chocolate Cookie, Crumbl also bakes four more desserts for its weekly rotating menu from January 26 through January 31, 2026. Here's what you can expect:
- Dubai Chocolate Cookie (pictured) - A brownie cookie layered with a crunchy kataifi and pistachio filling, finished with milk chocolate and a drizzle of pistachio cream.
- New White Drop Cookie featuring Hershey's Cookies 'N' Creme - A warm cookies & cream cookie topped with a melty mix of Hershey's Cookies 'n Creme and white drop pieces, and a single Hershey's Cookies 'n' Creme candy bar segment.
- Chocolate Hazelnut Cheesecake featuring Nutella - A chocolate and hazelnut cheesecake with a cookies & cream crust, topped with Nutella and whipped cream.
- Lemon Cupcake Cookie - A lemon vanilla cookie topped with lemon frosting and white sprinkles.
- Brookie Cookie - A warm mashup of a semi-sweet chocolate chip cookie and a chocolate cookie.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Brings Back Dubai Chocolate Cookie for Another Week

articles.description:
Leading up to the Super Bowl, Habit Burger & Grill launches new Char Sliders. The new Sliders are showcased in the Sliders Family CharBox.

Available for a limited time at participating locations chain-wide, the new Char Sliders are mini burgers featuring a chargrilled beef patty, American cheese, caramelized onions, pickles, and Thousand Island dressing on toasted, sesame seed buns. A pack of two includes a side of ranch and starts at $7.69 (it costs $8.09 here in Los Angeles).
The Sliders Family CharBox includes eight Char Sliders, four sides of your choice, and four housemade ranches (they offer Classic, Spicy, and Avocado Ranch) of your choice for $40.
Photo via Habit Burger & Grill.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Habit Serves Up New Char Sliders

articles.description:
Wendy's debuts the new Biggie Deals value menu as a refreshed take that builds on the chain's Biggie Bags, offering options at the $4, $6, and $8 price points. They include:

- $4 Biggie Bites - Choose either a Crispy Chicken Sandwich, a Jr. Cheeseburger, a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, four Chicken Nuggets, or Jr.-sized Fries to pair with either four Chicken Nuggets, Jr.-sized Fries, or a small soft drink.
- $6 Biggie Bag - Choose either a Crispy Chicken Sandwich, Jr. Cheeseburger, Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, or Double Stack to go with four Nuggets, Jr. Fries, and a small soft drink.
- $8 Biggie Bundle - Choose any two of the following: Crispy Chicken Sandwich, Jr. Cheeseburger, Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger, or Double Stack. Jr. Fries and a small soft drink are also included.
According to Wendy's, the new Biggie Deals "offers a variety of meal pairings with options fit for all fans, perfect for snacking, meals, late-night cravings, and more."
If you're looking to get the most bang for your buck, the Double Stack is generally the most expensive of the available Biggie Deals options, followed by the Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger.
Photo via Wendy's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Wendy's Debuts New Biggie Deals Value Menu

articles.description:
Einstein Bros Bagels is offering a limited-time deal where you can get a Build-Your-Own Egg Sandwich and a large hot or iced coffee for $8.

They're calling it the "$8 Breakfast & Brew."
The Build-Your-Own Egg Sandwich lets you choose from either the Pork Sausage & Cheese Egg Sandwich, the Turkey Sausage & Cheese Egg Sandwich, the Bacon & Cheese Egg Sandwich, the Ham & Cheese Egg Sandwich, or the Egg & Cheese Sandwich. Most of the sandwiches listed normally cost $8.49 at my local Einstein Bros here in Los Angeles (the exception being the Egg & Cheese, which is $7.79).
The base sandwich comes on a bagel of your choice (with an extra charge for select flavors), one egg (with an additional charge for two eggs or egg whites), and cheese (choose from Cheddar, American, or Swiss).
Cold brew and other beverages can be substituted for the brewed coffee, but will cost extra.
Photo via Einstein Bros Bagels.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Einstein Bros Offers $8 Breakfast & Brew Deal

articles.description:
Cafe-bakery chain Paris Baguette features a series of Salted Caramel Pretzel treats to anchor its 2025-2026 winter menu. Here's what the lineup looks like:

Available through March 3, 2026 - 
- Salted Caramel Pretzel Croissant Crisp - A crispy, pressed croissant covered in salted caramel and topped with pretzel pieces.
- Salted Caramel Pretzel Supreme Croissant - A round croissant filled with pastry cream, topped with salted caramel and pretzel pieces.
- Salted Caramel Pretzel King Cream Donut - A shell donut filled with custard cream, dipped in salted caramel, and topped with pretzel pieces and powdered sugar.
- Salted Caramel Pretzel Tart - Salted caramel and pretzel pieces layered in a buttery tart shell.
- Salted Caramel Pretzel Latte - Espresso with salted caramel sauce and milk of choice, drizzled with more caramel and topped with a pretzel. It is available hot or iced.
- Salted Caramel Pretzel Cold Brew - Cold brew coffee with salted caramel sauce, topped with sweet cream, caramel drizzle, and a pretzel.
- Salted Caramel Pretzel Matcha Latte -  Matcha with salted caramel sauce and milk of choice, drizzled with more caramel and topped with a pretzel. The drink is available hot or iced.
In addition to the Salted Caramel Pretzel lineup, Paris Baguette also adds two savory dishes:
- Quiche Lorraine - A classic French quiche made with bacon, egg, and cheese.
- Sourdough Tuna Melt Sandwich - Tuna salad topped with melted American cheese, served on toasted sourdough.
Finally, since it's prime football season, Paris Baguette offers two limited-time, football-inspired treats through February 8, 2026:
- King Cream Football Donut - A shell donut filled with custard cream and decorated with icing to resemble a football.
- Triple Chocolate Football Cream Cake - Chocolate sponge cake layered with chocolate soft cream and chocolate crisp pearls. It's shaped and decorated like a football (available in-cafe Friday through Sunday).
Photo via Paris Baguette.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Paris Baguette Goes with Salted Caramel Pretzel for 2025-2026 Winter Menu

articles.description:
Hardee's bolsters its breakfast menu with the launch of new Brioche Breakfast Sandwiches and Iced Coffees. Beer-Battered Fish Sandwiches are also back for a limited time and are being offered at a discounted price of two for $7 at participating locations.

The new sandwiches include the following options:
- Bacon, Egg & Cheese Brioche Sandwich - Cherrywood-smoked bacon, an egg, and American cheese, served on a toasted brioche-style bun.
- Sausage, Egg & Cheese Brioche Sandwich - A grilled sausage patty, an egg, and American cheese, served on a toasted brioche-style bun.
- Super Bacon Brioche Sandwich - Extra cherrywood-smoked bacon, an egg, and American cheese, served on a toasted brioche-style bun.
- Super Sausage Brioche Sandwich - Two grilled sausage patties, an egg, and American cheese, served on a toasted brioche-style bun.
- Monster Brioche Sandwich -A grilled sausage patty, cherrywood-smoked bacon, thin-sliced ham, an egg, and American cheese, served on a toasted brioche-style bun.
Hardee's new iced coffees feature iced coffee with half-and-half, plus either vanilla or caramel syrup.
Hardee's Beer-Battered Fish Sandwich features a Redhook beer-battered and fried Alaskan pollock fillet served with shredded lettuce and tartar sauce on a toasted brioche-style bun.

- Saucy Sriracha Hot Honey - "Hot honey gets saucy - Sriracha style."

According to Wingstop's heat scale, both Hot Honey Rub and Sweet Garlic Hot Honey measure in at three flames (out of five), while Saucy Sriracha Hot Honey comes in at four flames.

articles.description:
The Chicken Supreme is back for a limited time at Jack in the Box. It's joined by new Jibbis collectible bag charms to celebrate the fast-food chain's 75th anniversary.

The Chicken Supreme was first introduced in 1980 and discontinued in 2004. It consists of a crispy-fried chicken patty, Swiss-style cheese, lettuce, tomato, and mayo-onion sauce, served on a toasted wheat bun. A Double version is also available with a second chicken patty and an additional slice of cheese.
Pricing for the Chicken Supreme starts at $3.49. A Chicken Supreme combo meal with small fries and a drink starts at $5, while the Double Chicken Supreme combo meal starts at $7.
Finally, there's the Double Chicken Supreme Munchie Meal (pictured), which starts at $14. It includes a Double Chicken Supreme, two tacos, seasoned curly fries, and a regular drink. The meal also includes a limited-edition Jibbi bag charm.
There are four different Jibbis in all. Here's what they look like:

Photos via Jack in the Box.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: The Chicken Supreme is Back at Jack in the Box

- New Caramel Protein Latte - A permanent menu addition featuring Starbucks Espresso Roast, protein-boosted milk, and caramel syrup. It's available hot or iced and contains up to 27-29 grams of protein per Grande.
- New Iced Dubai Chocolate Matcha (available for a limited time only) - Matcha, pistachio sauce, milk, and ice, topped with chocolate …

articles.description:
Citing popular demand, Zaxbys brings back Southern Fried Shrimp and Giant Quesadillas for a limited time.

Zaxbys' Southern Fried Shrimp is available in three options:
- ZaxSeas Surf & Turf Meal - Eight Southern Fried Shrimp, Zax Sauce, three Chicken Fingerz, Texas Toast, Crinkle Fries, and a small drink.
- Southern Fried Shrimp Meal - Eight Southern Fried Shrimp, Zax Sauce, Texas Toast, Crinkle Fries, and a small drink.
- Southern Fried Shrimp Side - Eight shrimp with Zax Sauce.
Prices vary, but a location in Atlanta charges $14.99 for the Surf & Turf Meal, $11.49 for the Southern Fried Shrimp Meal, and $6.99 for eight shrimp.
There are two Giant Quesadillas to choose from:
- Chicken Bacon Ranch Quesadilla - Three hand-breaded Chicken Fingerz, Cheddar Jack cheese, hardwood-smoked bacon, and ranch dressing, folded into a warm flour tortilla. It's served with a side of ranch and a small drink.
- Chicken Fajita Quesadilla - Three hand-breaded Chicken Fingerz, Cheddar Jack cheese, grilled onions and peppers, and Southwest Ranch, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. It comes with a side of ranch and a small drink.
The same location sells both quesadillas for $11.49 each.
Photo via Zaxbys.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Southern Fried Shrimp and Giant Quesadillas Return to Zaxbys

The Iced Coffee is being tested with new Caramel and Mocha flavors in addition to the current Vanilla and Plain options.
The new Cream Cold Brew features the chain's cold-brewed coffee (same as its iced coffee) mixed with a sweet cream blend (the chain's milkshake base, according to the ingredients list) and served over ice. Like the Iced Coffee, it is available in Caramel, Mocha, Vanilla, and Plain varieties.
The coffee beverage test runs through January 31, 2026, while supplies last.

Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Chick-fil-A Tests New Cream Cold Brew

- Brown Sugar Cinnamon Cookie featuring Pop-Tarts - A warm brown sugar cinnamon-stuffed cookie topped with a brown sugar cream cheese glaze and crumbled Pop-Tarts.
- Strawberry Crumb Cake Cookie - A buttery strawberry cookie with white drops, topped with a milky glaze and strawberry vanilla streusel.
- Peanut Butter & Jelly Cookie - A warm peanut butter cookie topped with swirls of peanut butter mousse and raspberry topping.
The cookie bakery chain is also offering Chocolate Chip Cookie Thins on Thursdays only.
Photo via Crumbl.
